description_long: This is a modern, urban-style backpack with a rectangular silhouette and a telescoping handle, suggesting it can be used as a rolling bag. The front features a large, smooth pocket panel and subtle seam lines, while the sides have additional zippered compartments and a mesh pocket for bottles or accessories. The back is equipped with two padded, breathable mesh panels and two wide, padded shoulder straps for comfort, as well as a reinforced base with small feet for stability. The material appears to be a durable synthetic fabric, likely nylon or polyester, with a matte finish and reinforced stitching at stress points. The overall color is a deep charcoal or black, with minimal visible branding and no decorative elements. The zippers are robust and strategically placed for easy access to the main and secondary compartments.
description: A sleek, black urban backpack with a telescoping handle, multiple zippered compartments, and padded mesh back panels for comfort.
description_view_0: Front view shows a large, smooth front pocket, subtle seam lines, and the telescoping handle extended from the top.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the thickness of the bag, a side zipper compartment, and a mesh pocket near the base.
description_view_2: Back view displays two wide, padded shoulder straps, breathable mesh back panels, and the reinforced base with small feet.
description_view_3: Right side view highlights another side zipper compartment and the overall depth of the backpack.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, circular emblem is visible on the upper front panel, featuring a simple wave-like symbol with no text.
attribute_strap_design: Two wide, padded, adjustable shoulder straps with mesh padding and reinforced stitching; no visible chest or waist strap.
attribute_zipper_placement: One large zipper at the top for the main compartment, one horizontal zipper on the front pocket, and vertical zippers on both side compartments.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One main compartment, one large front pocket, two side zippered compartments, and one mesh side pocket.
